zh.lifeSummary: 當Oliver Woodruff於1290年出生在英國越可爾皮克林時，他的父親James Woodruff28歲，母親Eleanor Bruce21歲。他於1321年與Christian Saint Quintin在英國越可爾伍利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1381年在英國越可爾伍利享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Oliver Woodruff于1290年出生在英国越可爾皮克林时，他的父亲James Woodruff28岁，母亲Eleanor Bruce21岁。他于1321年与Christian Saint Quintin在英国越可爾伍利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1381年在英国越可爾伍利享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Woodruff
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English woderove ‘woodruff, sweet woodruff’ (Old English wudurofe), a sweet-scented plant. The leaves of the plant have a sweet smell and the surname may also have been a nickname for one who used it as a perfume, or perhaps an ironical nickname for a malodorous person. Alternatively, perhaps a topographic name for someone who lived at or near a place where woodruff grew. There may have been some confusion with Woodrow .

History: Two English families brought the name Woodruff to the American colonies: those of Matthew Woodruff and of John and Ann Woodruffe. The latter migrated to Lynn, MA, from Kent, and moved to Southampton, Long Island, NY, before 1640. John and Ann's many descendants were established in NJ, NC, and SC by 1790. The city of Woodruff, SC, is named for this family. The name is variously spelled Woodrove, Woodroffe, Woodruffe, Woodrough, and Woodruff in colonial records.

variants.name: Woodrow
meanings: English (Norfolk): from Middle English wode ‘wood’ + reue ‘row, row of houses’ (Old English wudu + rǣw, rāw). The surname may be topographic, for some who lived at or near a row of trees, or a row of houses within a wood, or it may be habitational, from any place so named, such as Wood Row in Hatfield Broad Oak (Essex) or Woodrow in Chaddesley Corbett (Worcestershire). There may have been some confusion with Woodruff .

nameMeanings.name: Oliver
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a French name, Olivier, recorded as the name of one of Charlemagne's paladins (retainers), the close companion in arms of Roland in the Chanson de Roland. Whereas Roland is headstrong and rash, Oliver is thoughtful and cautious. Ostensibly this name derives from Late Latin olivarius ‘olive tree’ ( compare Olive ), but Charlemagne's other paladins all bear solidly Germanic names, so it is more probably an altered form of a Germanic name, perhaps distantly connected with Old Norse Óleifr ‘ancestral relic’. It has remained in more or less continuous use since the medieval period, becoming ever more popular since the 1980s.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Oliver Woodruff was born in 1290, in Pickering, Yorkshire, England, his father, James Woodruff, was 28 and his mother, Eleanor Bruce, was 21. He married Christian Saint Quintin in 1321, in Woolley, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died in 1381, in Woolley, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Oliver Woodruff est né en 1290, à Pickering, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, James Woodruff, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Bruce, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Christian Saint Quintin en 1321, à Woolley, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1381, à Woolley, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Oliver Woodruff 1290 in Pickering, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Woodruff 28 und seine Mutter Eleanor Bruce 21. Er hat 1321 in Woolley, Yorkshire, England Christian Saint Quintin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1381 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Woolley, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Oliver Woodruff è nato il nel 1290 nel Pickering, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, James Woodruff, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Bruce, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Christian Saint Quintin nel 1321, nel Woolley, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1381, nel Woolley, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Oliver Woodruffが1290年にイギリスヨークシュアイアピッカーイングで生まれた時，父James Woodruffは28歳，母Eleanor Bruceは21歳であった。1321年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウリーでChristian Saint Quintinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1381年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウリーで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Oliver Woodruff(이)가 1290년 영국 요르크실르 피커잉에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Woodruff(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Bruce(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1321년 영국 요르크실르 보리에서 Christian Saint Quintin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1381년 영국 요르크실르 보리에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Oliver Woodruff nasceu em 1290, em Pickering, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, James Woodruff, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Bruce, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Christian Saint Quintin em 1321, em Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1381, em Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Oliver Woodruff родился в 1290 г. в местности пиккиринг, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени James Woodruff было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Bruce, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Christian Saint Quintin в 1321 г. в местности вулли, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1381 г. в местности вулли, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Oliver Woodruff nació en 1290, en Pickering, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, James Woodruff, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Eleanor Bruce, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Christian Saint Quintin en 1321, en Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió en 1381, en Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 91 años.
